agm_validation.description: The AGM Validation agent validates affected genomic model subjects with explicit identifier, label, and taxon context.

allele.description: The Allele Agent uses these methods to validate allele/variant identifiers.

controlled_vocabulary_validation.description: The Controlled Vocabulary Validation agent validates vocabulary rows by vocabulary name, term name, abbreviation, and synonym.

data_provider_validation.description: The Data Provider Validation agent validates provider abbreviations and provider-to-taxon consistency.

experimental_condition_validation.description: The Experimental Condition Validation agent composes ontology, controlled vocabulary, data-provider, taxon, and chemical component validation evidence into one condition-level decision.

gene.description: The Gene Agent uses these methods to validate gene identifiers and retrieve gene information.

gene_expression.description: The Gene Expression agent validates gene names found during PDF extraction.

gene_ontology.description: The GO Agent searches for Gene Ontology terms.

ontology_term_validation.description: The Ontology Term Resolver agent validates exact ontology CURIEs and resolves typed label or synonym lookups while preserving ambiguous or unresolved candidates.

subject_entity_validation.description: The Subject Entity agent routes explicit subject_type values to gene, allele, or AGM validation paths.

diagnostic.hint: For PDF evidence and document-tool advice, inspect the live runtime catalog with `get_tool_inventory` and `get_tool_details` instead of relying on remembered tool schemas.

curies.description: CURIE list for generic mapping helpers

entity_curies.description: Entity CURIEs for generic entity lookup

entity_names.description: Entity names or labels for generic entity lookup

force.description: Backward-compatible no-op; search methods no longer perform local symbol-shape validation

provider_name.description: Data provider display name for provider lookup

terms.description: CURIE list for bulk ontology term lookup

vocabulary.description: Controlled vocabulary name or display label

agent_studio.prompt_description: Structured API for Alliance curation database lookups. Filter by data_provider: MGI, FB, WB, ZFIN, RGD, SGD, HGNC.

bulk_list_optimization.instruction:
TOOL EFFICIENCY REQUIREMENT:
The request includes a large entity list. Minimize tool rounds.
Prefer bulk lookup methods when available (for example search_genes_bulk/search_alleles_bulk) using list inputs instead of one-call-per-entity loops.
If provider/model supports it, issue parallel tool calls in the same turn.
Avoid one-call-per-entity loops when enough evidence already exists to synthesize output.

agr_curation_query.description: Structured AGR curation database queries with lookup attempts, candidate matches, classifications, provider projections, ontology term and controlled vocabulary lookup/search helpers, and flow validation attachment reference lookups

documentation.summary: A unified package-owned tool for querying the Alliance Curation Database. Different agents use different methods of this tool based on their specialization.

required_tool_call.failure_message: did not call required database lookup tools before answering
required_tool_call.guardrail_message: You must query the package-declared curation lookup tool before answering. Use agr_curation_query first.

agr_literature_reference_lookup.description: ES-backed Alliance literature reference lookup and fuzzy title/citation search through agr-curation-api-client

example_queries: Resolve PMID:27528223 to an Alliance reference
Search Hahm KB Suppressed Helicobocter pylori by title text

parameters.description: Use get_literature_reference for exact identifier/title lookup or search_literature_references for fuzzy title/citation search.
parameters.name: method

parameters.description: PMID, DOI, AGRKB reference CURIE, MOD reference ID, or title for exact lookup.
parameters.name: identifier

parameters.description: Title, citation, AGRKB ID, PMID, DOI, or MOD reference ID for search.
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: Require exact search semantics for search_literature_references.
parameters.name: exact_match

parameters.description: Maximum candidate references to return for search_literature_references.
parameters.name: limit

documentation.summary: Resolve literature references from the Alliance literature Elasticsearch index through the official agr-curation-api-client package. Returns lookup attempts, candidate references, ambiguity/no-match details, and safe curator-facing status messages.

get_literature_reference.description: Exact lookup by PMID, DOI, AGRKB reference CURIE, MOD reference ID, or title using AGRCurationAPIClient(data_source="db").get_literature_reference().
get_literature_reference.name: Get Literature Reference

search_literature_references.description: Fuzzy reference search by title, citation, AGRKB ID, PMID, DOI, or MOD reference ID using AGRCurationAPIClient(data_source="db").search_literature_references().
search_literature_references.name: Search Literature References

agr_literature_reference_lookup.name: AGR Literature Reference Lookup

parameters.description: Name of the section to read (e.g., 'Methods', 'Introduction').
parameters.name: section_name

documentation.summary: Retrieves complete section text for discovery and context. Use source_chunks[].chunk_id with read_chunk for final evidence selection.

read_section.name: Read Section

read_subsection.description: Survey the full text of a specific subsection within a section.

parameters.description: Parent section name.
parameters.name: section_name

parameters.description: Subsection name to read.
parameters.name: subsection_name

documentation.summary: Retrieves subsection content for discovery and context. Use read_chunk on relevant chunks for final evidence selection.

read_subsection.name: Read Subsection

record_evidence.description: Create verified PDF evidence from backend-generated read_chunk span_ids.

parameters.description: Entity label associated with this evidence record.
parameters.name: entity

parameters.description: One or more span IDs copied from read_chunk(...).chunk.evidence_spans[].span_id.
parameters.name: span_ids

documentation.summary: Resolves selected evidence_spans[].span_id values against exact chunk text and returns backend-copied verified_quote plus locator metadata. Use one call for one evidence unit; multiple selected spans are stored as conjoined source fragments.

record_evidence.name: Record Evidence

resolve_domain_field_term.description: Resolve one final domain-pack controlled field selector and return copyable resolver provenance

parameters.description: Domain pack identifier, such as agr.alliance.gene_expression.
parameters.name: domain_pack_id

parameters.description: Curatable object type, such as GeneExpressionAnnotation.
parameters.name: object_type

parameters.description: Domain payload field path to resolve.
parameters.name: field_path

parameters.description: Evidence-backed paper phrase being resolved.
parameters.name: source_phrase

parameters.description: Optional quote, page, section, span IDs, provider, or taxon context from verified evidence.
parameters.name: evidence_context

parameters.description: Candidate CURIE selected from search or inspect results.
parameters.name: candidate_curie

parameters.description: Candidate non-CURIE value selected from search results, such as a vocabulary term name.
parameters.name: candidate_value

parameters.description: Alliance provider abbreviation for provider-scoped lookup.
parameters.name: data_provider

parameters.description: Optional taxon context preserved for audit and future routing.
parameters.name: taxon

parameters.description: Maximum candidate set used for final verification.
parameters.name: limit

documentation.summary: Final controlled-field resolver. This is the only ontology/CV resolver tool whose output may justify writing a controlled selector into extractor JSON.

resolve_domain_field_term.name: Resolve Domain Field Term

save_csv_file.description: Save data as a downloadable CSV file.

parameters.description: JSON array string of row objects to convert to CSV.
parameters.name: data_json

parameters.description: Output filename (without extension).
parameters.name: filename

parameters.description: Optional JSON array string listing column names in output order.
parameters.name: columns

documentation.summary: Creates a CSV file from structured row data and returns a download link.

save_csv_file.name: Save CSV File

save_json_file.description: Save data as a downloadable JSON file.

parameters.description: JSON string containing the data to serialize to JSON.
parameters.name: data_json

parameters.description: Output filename (without extension).
parameters.name: filename

parameters.description: Whether to pretty-print the JSON output with indentation.
parameters.name: pretty

documentation.summary: Creates a JSON file from structured data and returns a download link.

save_json_file.name: Save JSON File

save_tsv_file.description: Save data as a downloadable TSV file.

parameters.description: JSON array string of row objects to convert to TSV.

parameters.description: Output filename (without extension).
parameters.name: filename

parameters.description: Optional JSON array string listing column names in output order.

documentation.summary: Creates a TSV file from structured data and returns a download link.

save_tsv_file.name: Save TSV File

search_document.description: Discovery search over uploaded PDF chunks using hybrid, lexical, or hybrid-lexical-first retrieval.

parameters.description: Search query text (semantic + keyword matching).
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: Maximum number of results (default: 5).
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Filter to specific sections (e.g., ['Methods', 'Results']).
parameters.name: section_keywords

parameters.description: Retrieval mode: auto (default, maps to hybrid), hybrid, lexical, or hybrid_lexical_first. Use lexical for exact symbols/IDs and hybrid_lexical_first when normal hybrid search should retry with lexical-heavy matching if needed.
parameters.name: search_mode

documentation.summary: Finds relevant chunks in the uploaded PDF. Use returned chunk_id values with read_chunk for final evidence span selection. Use lexical-heavy modes for exact-match terms and controlled identifiers; keep auto/hybrid for broad conceptual searches.

search_document.name: Search Document

search_domain_field_terms.description: Search domain-pack-declared ontology and controlled-vocabulary candidates for one controlled field without accepting a final selector

parameters.description: Domain pack identifier, such as agr.alliance.gene_expression.
parameters.name: domain_pack_id

parameters.description: Curatable object type, such as GeneExpressionAnnotation.
parameters.name: object_type

parameters.description: Domain payload field path, such as relation.name or expression_pattern.where_expressed.
parameters.name: field_path

parameters.description: Evidence-backed paper label or controlled-field query text.
parameters.name: query

parameters.description: Optional source phrase, quote, figure, provider, or taxon context from verified evidence.
parameters.name: evidence_context

parameters.description: Alliance provider abbreviation for provider-scoped anatomy lookup.
parameters.name: data_provider

parameters.description: Optional taxon context preserved for audit and future routing.
parameters.name: taxon

parameters.description: Optional ontology branch root preserved for field-scoped branch filtering where available.
parameters.name: branch_root_curie

parameters.description: Maximum number of candidates to return.
parameters.name: limit

parameters.description: Require exact label/name matching when the declared package lookup method supports it.
parameters.name: exact_match

documentation.summary: Broad field-scoped candidate discovery from evidence-backed paper phrases. Search results are candidate guidance only; final selectors must be resolved with resolve_domain_field_term.

search_domain_field_terms.name: Search Domain Field Terms

stage_allele_observation.description: Stage one retained, evidence-backed Alliance allele mention candidate with paper-backed validator selector hints

documentation.summary: Stages one allele paper/evidence association candidate from verified evidence and the exact paper mention. The active allele validator owns final allele identity.

stage_allele_observation.name: Stage Allele Observation

stage_disease_observation.description: Stage one retained, evidence-backed disease assertion candidate with a disease mention, pending DOID term, subject (type+identifier), role/confidence, data provider, ECO evidence codes, relation, and source mentions

documentation.summary: Stages one disease builder candidate from verified evidence, a disease mention/DOID, the subject (which selects the concrete Gene/Allele/AGM subtype), ECO codes, and a relation. The active validators own final identity.

stage_disease_observation.name: Stage Disease Observation

stage_gene_expression_observation.description: Stage one Alliance gene-expression observation candidate with evidence and resolver-backed controlled selectors

documentation.summary: Stages one gene-expression builder candidate. Controlled fields must reference prior resolve_domain_field_term tool call IDs.

stage_gene_expression_observation.name: Stage Gene Expression Observation

stage_gene_mention_evidence.description: Stage one retained, evidence-backed Alliance gene mention candidate with paper-backed identity hints

documentation.summary: Stages one gene_mention_evidence builder candidate from verified evidence and paper-backed identity hints. The gene validator owns final identity.

stage_gene_mention_evidence.name: Stage Gene Mention Evidence

stage_phenotype_observation.description: Stage one retained, evidence-backed phenotype assertion candidate with a free-text statement, pending subject/term references, and source mentions

documentation.summary: Stages one PhenotypeAnnotation builder candidate from verified evidence, a free-text phenotype statement, and pending subject/term references. The active validators own final identity.

stage_phenotype_observation.name: Stage Phenotype Observation

parameters.name: entity

parameters.description: Field path supported by this evidence.
parameters.name: field_path

parameters.description: Agent-authored note about how this evidence should be used.

update_recorded_evidence_metadata.name: Update Evidence Metadata
